message.content: This section answers questions regarding the 2025 mobile game advertising landscape in Europe, specifically addressing market scale, creative format distribution, top-performing titles, and monthly campaign fluctuations. It provides key metrics: 67,000 mobile game advertisers (+22% YoY), 12.8 million unique creatives (+34% YoY), and a 76.8% share for video creatives. It identifies trending entities including Block Crush!, Paint by Number, Coloring Games, Match Villains, Umamusume: Pretty Derby, Pixel Rumble, and Dream Raiders. The section contains monthly trend figures tracking advertiser counts (~16K–24K) and active creatives, alongside percentages for new creative adoption. It supports the strategic claim that European ad volume is experiencing slow growth, with user acquisition efforts increasingly focused on the puzzle/casual genre and refined through niche IP integration. All data and trend visualizations are sourced from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module, covering January to December 2025.

The section contains monthly trend figures tracking advertiser counts (~16K–24K) and active creatives, alongside percentages for new creative adoption.
